channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: Multi-omics-based machine learning model predicts response and guides treatment in Crohn's disease: a case study in nutritional therapy-response to editorial.
Conference Report: The FutuRE oF MinimalLy InvasivE GI and Capsule DiagnosTics (REFLECT), September 2025.
item.description: Diagnostics (Basel, Switzerland) - Capsule endoscopy (CE) is evolving from a primarily small-bowel imaging modality into a broader diagnostic platform that increasingly incorporates artificial intelligence (AI), robotic technologies...
